hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"You are starting a session on the Regional Student Assessment Data Platform project. Before any other work, read .claude/skills/session-start.md and follow the procedure in full (review MEMORY.md and all linked memory files, read .claude/skills/regional-assessment-platform.md, read docs/implementation-plan.md, load any relevant skills based on next steps, then give the user a synopsis). The project-local skills in .claude/skills/ are not auto-discovered by the harness, so this hook substitutes for their absence."}}'
